/CAL: TO ISSUE BW, STATUS OF SSF CASE, LD 06-28-22/VD: LD 06-28-22, AND 05-31-22 AND 06-17-22 COURT DATES/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:40000/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:06-28-22/SHER/BAIL:15,000/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:LAURIE LOFTUS, SFPD/WIT SWORN:CHRISTOPHER PRESCOTT, SFPD/X:DEFENSE 17B MOTION IS DENIED/HTA1:2/MISDRED1:1/X:MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 1, 3 & 4 ARE CERTIFIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22ON 04-29-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, LD 04-15-22, ACM ELIG RPT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO//CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICEON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/DEF:ENTER AND COMPLETE HR360 RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM AND REPORT TO ACM 5X PER WEEK/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/
